ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open Obsidian automatically whenever you log into your computer.
ast.target: 登录电脑时自动打开 Obsidian。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Hides the app and continues to run it in the background instead of quitting
      it when pressing the window close button or toggle focus hotkey.
ast.target: \n      按下窗口关闭按钮或切换焦点快捷键时，隐藏应用并继续在后台运行，而不是退出。\n

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Hides the window's icon from from the dock/taskbar. Enabling the tray icon first
      is recommended if using this option. This may not work on Linux-based OSes.
ast.target: \n      从 Dock/任务栏隐藏窗口图标。如果使用此选项，建议先启用托盘图标。在基于 Linux 的操作系统上可能无法正常工作。\n

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Set the image used by the tray/menubar icon. Recommended size: 16x16
Preview:
ast.target:
设置托盘/菜单栏图标使用的图像。推荐尺寸：16x16
预览：

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Set a title to identify the tray/menubar icon by. The {{vault}} placeholder will be replaced by the vault name.
Preview:
ast.target:
设置一个标题以标识托盘/菜单栏图标。{{vault}} 占位符将被替换为保险库名称。
预览：

ast.name: desc
ast.source: New quick notes will be placed in this folder.
ast.target: 新的快速笔记将放置在此文件夹中。
